best_bet.reason: You'll catch the warmest water temps of the three counties with slightly better wave action at 1 to 3 feet, plus that moderate south-to-north longshore current keeps sand moving and shells depositing all morning.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
